title: helianthemum nummularium var. pyrenaicum
intro: Helianthemum nummularium var. pyrenaicum, also known as Pyrenean rockrose, is a type of flowering plant in the Cistaceae family, characterized by its showy pink or white flowers and small, rounded leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum nummularium var. pyrenaicum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in topical applications for skin conditions such as wounds and eczema.
